results.name: Every button has an onClick handler (no dead buttons)
At least one form of persistence (localStorage or Convex)
Navigation works (useNavigate calls exist for all routes)
Toast/feedback system exists
At least one dynamic timestamp (not hardcoded date)
Company data can be saved and loaded
At least one state transition with visual feedback
Error boundaries exist
Loading states exist for async operations
At least one share mechanism exists
Accept action shows immediate visual change (green state, icon swap)
Reject action removes item with animation
Defer action shows distinct visual state from accept
User actions appear in the activity feed
Actions counter updates in real-time
Streak tracker increments across days
Message input produces a response (not just sends)
Approval flow has at least 2 outcomes (approve/reject)
At least 3 different toast variants (success/warning/error)
Conversation persists across page reloads
Daily memo content changes based on date
What Changed feed includes user's own past actions
Intervention rankings change after user accepts/rejects
Agent status can change between sessions
At least one metric visually updates based on user behavior
Dashboard shows different state on first visit vs return visit
Streak has visual escalation (different styling at 3, 7, 30 days)
At least one surprise element (random tip, insight, or suggestion)
Notifications or badges for pending items
Time-based content (morning vs evening greeting)
User-created data accumulates and is visible (decisions history)
Share button copies a working URL that renders without auth
Shared memo has OG meta tags for social previews
Shared memo looks screenshot-worthy (dark mode, branded, clean)
At least 3 types of content can be shared
Print stylesheet exists for shareable content
User can export data (JSON, CSV, or PDF)
Decision history is browsable/searchable
Company profile confidence changes based on user actions
Agent connection shows live status indicator
Stagger animations on page transitions
Hover states on all interactive cards
Keyboard shortcuts for common actions (Accept=A, Defer=D)
Sound feedback option (click sounds, notification sounds)
Confetti or celebration animation on milestones
Undo for destructive actions (reject with undo toast)
Drag-and-drop for priority reordering
Quick-add for signals/notes without leaving dashboard
Command palette (Cmd+K) for power users
Onboarding tooltips that highlight new features on first visit
